prophecies.q: 日本将来会发生大地震吗？
prophecies.a: 关于自然灾害的事情，我只能告诉你们：请做好准备。
prophecies.q_en: Will Japan have a major earthquake in the future?
prophecies.a_en: Regarding natural disasters, I can only tell you one thing: please be prepared.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2062未来人于2010年11月首次发帖，并在2011年3月9日再次出现——仅两天后的3月11日，日本东北地方太平洋近海发生里氏9.0级大地震，引发海啸，造成约19,747人死亡。虽然他没有明确预言地震的时间和地点，但其再次出现的时间节点与大地震仅相隔两天，这一巧合引发了广泛关注。判定为「部分相关」是因为预言本身过于模糊。
prophecies.verdict_en: The 2062 Future Man first posted in November 2010 and reappeared on March 9, 2011 — just two days before the March 11 magnitude 9.0 Tohoku earthquake struck, triggering a tsunami that killed approximately 19,747 people. While he didn't explicitly predict the earthquake's timing or location, his reappearance just two days before the disaster drew widespread attention. Rated 'partial' because the prediction itself was too vague.
prophecies.yearReason: 2062未来人在2ch论坛帖子中提到了该年份
prophecies.yearReason_en: The 2062 future man mentioned this year in his 2ch forum posts

prophecies.a_en: Nuclear energy is no longer used.

prophecies.q: 你想对2010年的人说什么？
prophecies.a: 请珍惜现在的生活，善待身边的人。未来会发生很多变化，有好的也有坏的。保持希望，做好准备。
prophecies.q_en: What do you want to say to people in 2010?
prophecies.a_en: Please cherish your current life and be kind to the people around you. Many changes will happen in the future, both good and bad. Keep hope and be prepared.

prophecies.q: 你能透露一个即将发生的大事件吗？
prophecies.a: 我只能说，接下来这段时间对日本非常重要。请一定要做好准备。
prophecies.q_en: Can you reveal a major upcoming event?
prophecies.a_en: I can only say that the coming period is very important for Japan. Please make sure to be prepared.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 这条消息发布于2011年3月9日，仅两天后的3月11日即发生了东日本大地震。「接下来这段时间对日本非常重要」和「请做好准备」被许多人解读为地震的暗示。但由于措辞极为模糊，既未提及地震、海啸等关键词，也未指明具体时间，判定为部分相关。
prophecies.verdict_en: This message was posted on March 9, 2011, just two days before the March 11 Tohoku earthquake. 'The coming period is very important for Japan' and 'please be prepared' were interpreted by many as hints about the earthquake. However, the wording was extremely vague, mentioning neither earthquakes nor tsunamis, and giving no specific timing, so it is rated as partially relevant.
